answer: Yes. Hunter's Mark is a 1st-level Ranger spell in D&D 2024. A level-1 Ranger has Spellcasting from level 1 and can prepare it. In fact, the Ranger's Favored Enemy feature makes Hunter's Mark always prepared (it does not count against the prepared-spell limit) and lets the Ranger cast it a limited number of times per long rest without expending a spell slot.
